rules.description: With Purge protection enabled, soft deleted stores can't be purged in the retention period. If disabled, the soft deleted store can be purged before the retention period expires.
rules.query: where sku.name <> 'free' | where (properties.enablePurgeProtection <> true) or isnull(properties.enablePurgeProtection )
rules.fix: With Purge protection enabled, soft deleted stores can't be purged in the retention period. If disabled, the soft deleted store can be purged before the retention period expires.

rules.description: SLA is not available for Free tier. Upgrade to the Standard tier to get an SLA of 99.9%
rules.fix: SLA is not available for Free tier. Upgrade to the Standard tier to get an SLA of 99.9%
